label: Structural VAR / ARIMAX leading indicator reference
description: Use when macro, price, inventory, and downstream demand lead/lag structure is observable and the goal is driver attribution rather than simple extrapolation.

label: Bullwhip / inventory cycle reference
description: Use when buyer orders, channel inventory, lead times, and supply-chain amplification dominate observed memory order volatility.

label: Technology diffusion / small-sample reference
description: Use for new memory technologies or domains where history is short and adoption is better represented as diffusion/mix transition than stationary time series.
